ValidationRule.errorConditionFormula:
AND( NOT($User.Bypass_Validation_Rules__c), CONTAINS($Label.CCCM_Closure_Confmn_Status_RTdevName, RecordType.DeveloperName), NOT(ISBLANK(TEXT(Closure_confirmation_status__c))), ISCHANGED(Closure_confirmation_status__c),
OR( NOT( OR( ISPICKVAL(Closure_confirmation_status__c, "N/A"), ISPICKVAL(Closure_confirmation_status__c, "Send email to customer"), ISPICKVAL(Closure_confirmation_status__c, "Service request opening") ) ),
AND( ISPICKVAL(Closure_confirmation_status__c, "Send email to customer"), NOT( OR( ISPICKVAL(PRIORVALUE(Closure_confirmation_status__c), ""), ISPICKVAL(PRIORVALUE(Closure_confirmation_status__c), "N/A"), ISPICKVAL(PRIORVALUE(Closure_confirmation_status__c), "Closure rejected by customer") ) ) ),
AND( ISPICKVAL(Closure_confirmation_status__c, "N/A"), NOT(ISBLANK(PRIORVALUE(Closure_confirmation_status__c))) ) ) )
ValidationRule.errorMessage: You are not allowed to update any value other than 'N/A' , 'Send email to customer' and 'Service request opening' / You are allowed to update N/A' only if the previous value was empty
